meaning: n.矿泉,温泉区,游乐胜地,矿泉疗养地
examples: Here is an image of, we'll call it, the SPA Basin.
The dust at the bottom of the SPA Basin really does have a fascinating story to tell.
It is a clinic, not a spa: there's no namby-pamby faffing around with rose petals and whale music.
The 18-story square hotel has 274 rooms, an Iridium Spa and six bars and restaurants.
It may be designated as a Special Area of Conservation (SAC) or Special Protected Area (SPA).
